text:
8.2       The court may direct that—


(a)        service is effected by an alternative method or at an alternative place; or


(b)        service be dispensed with.


8.3       Subject to paragraph 8.6, where the applicant is—


(a)        an organisation, service must be effected by the organisation, the organisation’s representative or the representative’s agent;


(b)        an individual who is represented, service must be effected by their representative or the representative’s agent; and


(c)        an individual acting in person, the court officer must effect service.


8.4       The court may abridge the period specified in paragraph 8.1.


8.5       Service on any person other than P (who must be served personally) must be in accordance with Part 6.


8.6       Where the person to be served is a child—


(a)        unless the court directs otherwise, the court officer must not effect service; and


(b)        the court must give directions as to how service is to be effected.


8.7       Where the documents listed in paragraph 8.1 are served on the person to be protected (and that person is not the applicant), they must be accompanied by a notice informing that person—


(a)        how to apply to be joined as a party to the proceedings; and


(b)        of that person’s right to make representations orally or in writing at any hearing.


8.8       Where the DAPO application relates to a property and sets out details of any mortgagee or landlord of the property pursuant to paragraph 3.4(c)(ii), the applicant must serve on the mortgagee or landlord—


(a)        a copy of the application; and


(b)        notice of the right to make representations in writing.


8.9       A certificate of service stating the date and time of service on each person served must be filed by—


(a)        the person or organisation who served the DAPO application and any other documents; or


(b)        the representative of the person or organisation.


8.10     This paragraph applies to service of an application for variation or discharge of a DAPO on notice as it applies to service of an application for a DAPO on notice.
